# YT-Downloader (GENERATED BY AI :)

A dual-interface tool providing both a CLI and a Python GUI for `yt-dlp` to easily download video and audio.

## 📁 Project Structure

Place all required executable files in the root directory as shown below:

```text
yt-downloader/
├── ffmpeg.exe -> https://www.ffmpeg.org/download.html
├── mpv.exe -> https://mpv.io/
├── yt-dlp.exe -> https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp
├── yt-downloader.bat
└── yt-downloader.pyw
```

## 🚀 Prerequisites

Before running the application, ensure you have the following components:

1. **Python 3.x** installed on your system (required for the GUI version).
2. **External Binaries** placed in the project folder:
   * `yt-dlp.exe`: The core download engine (https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp).
   * `ffmpeg.exe`: Required for merging high-quality video and audio streams (https://www.ffmpeg.org/download.html).
   * `mpv.exe`: Optional, used for video preview/playback functionality (https://mpv.io/).

## 🛠️ How to Run

### 1. CLI Version (`yt-downloader.bat`)
* **Usage**: Double-click `yt-downloader.bat`.
* **Description**: Launches a text-based Command Line Interface (CLI) inside the Windows Command Prompt. Ideal for quick, lightweight downloads.

### 2. GUI Version (`yt-downloader.pyw`)
* **Usage**: Double-click `yt-downloader.pyw`.
* **Description**: Launches a Graphical User Interface (GUI). Thanks to the `.pyw` extension, it runs directly as a windowed application without opening an extra background terminal window.

## ✨ Features

* **Dual Interface**: Choose between a lightweight CLI script or a visual GUI.
* **Zero Setup**: Portable structure; all dependencies reside within the same folder.
* **High Quality**: Automatic stream merging (e.g., 1080p/4K video with audio) using `ffmpeg`.
